return(function(a,N,o,K,E,F,l,O,M,d,c,t,p,g,b,u,X,D,R,v,Q,C,T,w,P)R,c,b,d,D,M,P,X,t,v,p,w,O,g,Q,C,u,T=function(a,k)local N=u(k)local o=function(o,K,E,F)return O(a,{o,K;E,F},k,N)end return o end,function(a,k)local N=u(k)local o=function(o,K,E,F,l,T)return O(a,{o;K,E;F,l;T},k,N)end return o end,function(a)D[a]=D[a]-(234583+-234582)if D[a]==417832-417832 then D[a],T[a]=nil,nil end end,function(a)local k,O=-582753-(-582754),a[586882+-586881]while O do D[O],k=D[O]-(946828+-946827),(-216672-(-216673))+k if D[O]==-31846+31846 then D[O],T[O]=nil,nil end O=a[k]end N=u(k)local o=function(o,K)return O(a,{o;K},k,N)end return o end,function(O,o,K,E)local Mw={}local
